description: You are the Engineering Director at DevLabs. Q1 2025 has ended and you must formally reconcile the 'Q1 2025 Goals' milestone in the Infrastructure & DevOps project. Audit all issues in the 'Q1 2025 Goals' milestone: classify each as completed (status Closed or Resolved) or incomplete (any other status), and determine the total estimated hours and total hours actually spent across all Q1 issues. Create a wiki page titled 'Q1_2025_Retrospective' in the Infrastructure & DevOps project with three sections: a 'Milestone Summary' section listing total issue count, completed count, incomplete count, total estimated hours, and total spent hours; a 'Carryover Items' section listing each incomplete issue's subject and current assignee; and a 'Risk Assessment' section identifying the highest-priority incomplete issue as the primary risk for Q2. Move every incomplete Q1 2025 Goals issue to the 'Q2 2025 Goals' milestone, adding the note 'Carried over from Q1: delivery incomplete, re-prioritized for Q2.' to each. Set the 'Q1 2025 Goals' version status to Closed. Finally, on whichever Q1 issue had the most total hours logged against it, add the note: 'Q1 Retro: Highest effort item at X hours. Recommend decomposition into smaller deliverables for Q2.' where X is the actual total hours spent on that issue. Login credentials: admin / Admin1234!

incomplete_issue_fragments: Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions
Set up Kubernetes cluster for production workloads
Staging database running out of disk space
metadata.highest_priority_incomplete_fragment: Staging database running out of disk space
metadata.highest_effort_issue_fragment: Migrate CI/CD from Jenkins to GitHub Actions
